author: megaport
title: das beste
content: egal mit welchem server es wird eigentlich alles unterstützt und das ohne Probleme ich nutze dav / nextcloud und bin sehr zufrieden

author: Cannot recommend it
title: Crashes in the background
content: It’s easy to synchronise your cloud files, but the app crashes almost always when it is running on the background, e.g. listening to music when using the gps.

author: Kleine Hexe5359732
title: Offline doesn't keep the mark
content: I use it for audiobooks and when i reopen it it always goes back to the beginning 😤

author: NicoIate
title: slow
content:
can take more than a minute to load a song and then does it all over again for the next one, it's unusable.
I recommend Plexamp instead to everyone in need of streaming their own library

author: Jetic
title: Delays and breaks during playback
content: When playing music to a bluetooth device, every song has breaks in it, as if tue buffering method would be odd. I don’t have such problems with any other music app. Also, many bugs when playing to bluetooth speakers such as volume cannot be changed.

author: nicec picec zOh
title: Die App kann nicht zu mir passen
content: Ich finde, dass Spotify besser als diese App ist. Die Spotify App macht das viel besser und kann viel besser die Wiedergabe optimieren.

author: Homoplancatus
title: Ne fonction pas avec iXpand
content: J’ai acheté Evermusic car il était indiqué que l’on pouvait lire la musique stocker sur iXpand. L’app voit la clef iXpand mais pas les fichiers musicaux.

author: DerBuecherwurm
title: Version 5.1 does not work at all
content:
With version 5.1 I can not hear music any longer. I connect to dropbox, see my music files and click on one. The loading symbol appears for some seconds. Then the focus jumps to the next file. The loading symbol appears for some seconds, the focus... And so on through all my files. 
In the version before, everything was fine.

PLEASE FIX IT.

Thank you.

author: B-abylon
title: Ordner Foto
content:
Leider hängt das hochgeladene Foto immer auf links ?

Bitte fixen

author: Olliindahouse
title: Widgets
content: Könnte man Widget für iOS 14 hinzufügen?

author: Gianni50
title: App completa!!
content: App completa!!

author: Jojocool824
title: Player
content: Good player usine à lot thé battery

author: Goodsound*
title: Could be better
content:
Audio Tags editing must be possible for *all* tags present. You cannot edit „Composer“ or „Conductor“ or „Rating“ etc. just the 6 most basic tags.
This app should support UPNP.
Earned the second star for supporting FLAC.

author: MikeeeGER
title: Gut aber...
content: ... die Cover werden nicht im Cache gespeichert. Es geht jedesmal extrem lange bis die Covers in der Übersicht zu sehen sind. Und wenn ich die fehlenden Covers selber ergänzen könnte wäre Super!! Dann gibt es 5 Sterne 🌟

author: Gaucho Matero
title: Bestes Musikprogramm bis jetzt...
content:
...welches ich auf dem Store gefunden habe. Bin sehr zufrieden damit. 2 Punkte zu meckern habe ich aber trotzdem:
1. Beim herunterladen eines Interpreten bitte die Tracks gleich in Alben ordnen
2. wie kann ich Musik von der Dropbox und der iPod-Bibliothek zusammenfügen? Kann von mir aus auch nur verlinkt sein, wenn es mit Verschieben nicht geht, aber hätte gerne EINE Übersicht über alle meiner Musik

author: Hans.Mans.Kanz
title: Gut
content: Gut

author: drewla2
title: Full-featured but not over-complex
content: Very good app, gets balance right between functionality and complexity. Does what most other audio apps struggle with, but what many users want — the ability to access Dropbox, iCloud, and other file stores, and use them on- or offline. Has everything I need including sleep timer, bookmarking (essential for audiobooks), and playlists. And tons more. Well designed and good value.

author: Zyzoke
title: Passt
content: Genau was ich wollte. Kann so alle Tracks auf meinem Media Server anhören, ohne irgendwelche seltsamen Anforderungen. Wiedergabelisten, Alben und Interpreten alle relativ einfach zum Upsetten.

author: NYALYLY
title: Décevant
content:
Le design est plutôt sympa, on peut faire autant de playlist qu’on veut.
Le souci, même en shuffle les chansons se répète tellement donc on ne peut pas écouter toutes les chansons.

author: srdlucky
content: Sehr gut alles

author: Jonas The Bard
title: Best cloud music player
content: I have tried pretty much all of them and this one is the only one that holds up, and does everything i need it to do. By far the best on iOS.

author: user666976464772
title: Perfect on paper, but so many crashes
content: The webdav conf and backup/restore functionalities are perfect, but the app keep on crashing...

author: Alsandro73
title: Ever
content: Very good app

author: nsrhkwbd
title: Verarche
content: Mann kann nicht mal ein Lied abspielen. Geschweige denn in die Playlist hinzufügen. Wenn man etwas sucht dann kommt immer kein Treffer auf xy.

author: Marysha6
title: Top
content: Super App, hat selten Störungen

author: Uset43403535
title: Crashes constantly since the update. Avoid.
content: I bought it years ago and was happy. Now it‘s a mess.

author: migi71
title: Gute Musik App
content: Man muss nur z.B. Ein Dropbox Konto haben und dann kann man ganz einfach die Musik auf das Handy laden und Offline hören🙂Super App!!

author: marcelkuechler
title: Great App
content: I was looking for an app that could stream and download music and audio books from my NAS using WebDAV. Evermusic is the best I found.

author: avyarochkin
title: Excellent player!
content: My favorite music player just got better! Reads all my library and plays everything seamlessly!

author: Glitzerfischli
title: BEST MUSIC APP!
content:
Such a good and simple app!!
-
For all those who dont understand how to download music:

1. Download music from Youtube (or something similar). For example with clipconverter.cc .

2. Upload it in to a online-file, for example Dropbox.

3. Download music-data THROUGH this app to your phone.

Now you have highquality music to enjoy OFFLINE!

author: Jasquito
title: Complicated
content: So complicated with the system with those storages... Playtube is way easier...
